hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env|app\.config\.ts|eas\.json|package\.json)' && echo 'Blocked: sensitive file requires manual review' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|git push|eas build|eas submit|npx expo publish)' && echo 'Blocked: destructive command requires manual approval' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || exit 0
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.test\.(ts|tsx)$' && npx jest --no-watchman --passWithNoTests "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -5 || exit 0
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | head -20 || exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); [ "$(echo $INPUT | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = 'true' ] && exit 0; terminal-notifier -message 'Claude finished' -title 'Claude Code' -sound default 2>/dev/null || osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "Claude Code"'
